residual_risks: No CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md standards files exist anywhere in this repository (verified via find for both root and ancestor directories of all changed files). This reviewer's mandate is to audit changes against project-written standards; with no such standards present, no compliance findings can be produced. This is a gap the project may want to address (e.g., documenting conventions for Next.js pages/components, color/token usage, or font-loading patterns) but it is not itself a defect in this diff.
